subject: राजस्थान का इतिहास
question_en: Who was the first Maharaja of Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर के पहले महाराजा कौन थे।
explanation_en: Rao Jodhaji was the first Maharaja of Jaipur.
explanation_hi: राव जोधाजी जयपुर के पहले महाराजा थे।
explanation_fr: L'histoire de Jaipur a commencé avec Rao Jodhaji comme premier maharaja.

subject: राजस्थान
question_en: Who were the Mauryan kings who ruled Rajasthan during the reign of Ashoka Maurya?
question_hi: अशोक मौर्यन कोणी राजस्थान के अंगमिल राजा थें।
explanation_en: During Ashoka Maurya's reign, the Mauryan kings who ruled Rajasthan were Chandragupta I and Mahananda Gupta.
explanation_hi: अशोक मौर्यन के काम सपुत्तिन और माहनानंदगोप्टिन इन काम
explanation_fr: Pendant la régence d'Ashoka Maurya, les rois Maurya qui règnent sur Rajasthan étaient Chandragupta I et Mahananda Gupta.

subject: राजस्थान
question_en: Which Raja Pratap Singh has built the famous Amber Fort in Jaipur?
explanation_en: Raja Pratap Singh II is famously known for building the Amber Fort in Jaipur.
